abilities.name: Staying Useful
abilities.flavor: The Hunter's companions are handy spotters and trackers.
abilities.effect: While any of this unit’s Gnoblar or Frost Sabre tokens are on the battlefield, this unit has WARD ( 5+ ) . Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, remove 1 of this unit’s tokens from the battlefield. If this unit’s Frost Sabre token has been removed, it can no longer attack with its Frost Sabre’s Fangs .

abilities.name: No Slacking!
abilities.flavor: The Icebrow Hunter that leads the Mantrappers gets his followers in line with a menacing snort.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly INFANTRY unit wholly within 12" of this unit.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice On a 3+, add the result to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Staying Useful

abilities.effect: Roll a dice On a 3+, add the result to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Down To The Ironguts
abilities.flavor: It is not often that a mawtribe’s battleline falters, but if it does, the Tyrant will call upon their Ironguts to turn the battle back in their favour.
abilities.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to this unit’s control score .

abilities.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to this unit’s control score .

abilities.name: Rain Of Scrap
abilities.flavor: Salvaged weapons and shards of metal rain down upon the enemy, forcing them to take cover or dodge out of the way.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any models slain this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: No Shortage Of Volunteers
abilities.flavor: When your choices are potentially dying at the hands of the enemy or being eaten alive by a hungry ogor, most Gnoblars are willing to take their chances with the enemy.
abilities.effect: You can return D3 models to this unit.

abilities.name: Down To The Ironguts

battleTraits.name: Let's Get Stuck In
battleTraits.summary: Set up this unit wholly within friendly territory, wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge, and not in combat
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit wholly within friendly territory, wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge, and not in combat .
